overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character in a dark coat and cowboy hat walking through a historic city street at night. The character navigates muddy roads with trolley tracks, passes horse-drawn traffic and an electric streetcar, then enters a narrow alley leading to a private courtyard with tropical vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with gas lamps and storefronts

events.description: horse rider gallops past from right to left on the muddy street
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy street between historic brick buildings with gas lamps

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street from right to left

entered.detail: two-story brick building with green shutters and signage reading CHINESE LAUNDRY
large painted sign for DOYLE'S TAVERN visible in the distance above the street
multi-story brick building with wrought iron balconies and shuttered windows
cast iron street lamp emitting warm orange light
wet muddy street surface with visible trolley tracks and puddles reflecting light

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a historic city street at night, illuminated by gas lamps. The Chinese Laundry building stands on the right while a horse-drawn carriage passes by on the muddy cobblestone road.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching Doyle's Tavern with trolley tracks

events.description: electric trolley/streetcar passes from left to right along the tracks
approaching the wrought iron gate entrance to Doyle's Tavern

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward Doyle's Tavern as a trolley passes

notable_agents.action: electric trolley moving along tracks from left to right, partially blocking the view

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with large DOYLE'S TAVERN signage and red painted doors
green electric streetcar with large windows moving along metal tracks
wrought iron gate with decorative scrollwork leading to an alley beside the tavern

segments.scene_description: The character approaches Doyle's Tavern as an electric trolley passes by on the tracks. The wrought iron gate entrance to the side alley becomes visible as the Chinese Laundry building recedes behind.

events.description: passing through the wrought iron gate into the narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: walking through the iron gate into the narrow passage between buildings

entered.detail: tall red brick wall with weathered plaster and exposed brick sections
dark wooden wall with a closed door and metal fixtures
confined walkway leading toward a lit opening at the far end

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow alley through the wrought iron gate, leaving the street behind. The passage is flanked by tall brick and wooden walls, creating a confined corridor leading toward a distant light.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential courtyard with tropical vegetation and outdoor seating

events.description: emerging from the narrow alley into the open courtyard space

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard examining the outdoor furniture and tropical plants

entered.detail: large cylindrical wooden water cistern with metal bands
tropical palm trees and dense foliage in the courtyard center
wooden dining table with chairs arranged in the courtyard
white sheets and clothing hanging on lines strung between buildings
stacked wooden barrels and crates near the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the alley into a private courtyard filled with tropical vegetation, outdoor furniture, and hanging laundry lines. A large wooden water tank stands to the left while the space opens up to reveal a secluded residential area with scattered chairs and tables.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, gas-lit historic city street into the secluded intimacy of a private tropical courtyard. It begins by trailing the character past the Chinese Laundry building on a muddy cobblestone road as a horse-drawn carriage passes by. As the character approaches Doyle's Tavern and an electric trolley glides along the tracks, the view shifts toward a wrought iron gate that marks the exit from the main thoroughfare. The scene then narrows into a confined corridor flanked by tall brick and wooden walls, creating a sense of enclosure before the path opens up toward a distant light. Finally, the camera emerges from the alley into a lush residential courtyard filled with tropical vegetation, hanging laundry, and a large wooden water tank.
